payload.content: Now I'll create main.py that imports and runs both the generator and analyzer sequentially:
payload.tool_calls: [ChatMessageToolCall(id='call_3d96a535065040b1a0d2fb32', function=ChatMessageToolCallFunction(name='delegate_task', arguments='{"context_files": ["generator.py", "analyzer.py"], "expected_deliverable": "main.py that imports and runs generator and analyzer sequentially", "instructions": "Create a Python script called main.py that:\\n- Imports the generate_sales_data function from generator.py\\n- Imports the analyze_sales_data function from analyzer.py  \\n- Calls generator.generate_sales_data() to create the CSV\\n- Calls analyzer.analyze_sales_data() to calculate and print revenue\\n- Make it runnable as a standalone script (not imported)", "task_name": "main"}'), TYPE='function')]
